subject: gmrc
title: Duke's Kindness Challenge
objective: Understand the importance of respect, helping others, and honesty in everyday life. (GMRC: Good Manners and Right Conduct)

steps.narrationText: Duke the friendly aspin dog loves helping everyone in Cat Village! Today, Duke wants to share three important values: respect (paggalang), helping others (pagtulong), and honesty (katapatan). These are called Good Manners and Right Conduct — GMRC!

One morning, Milo was rushing to the Number Market when he bumped into Ollie the owl. Ollie dropped all his scrolls! 'Watch where you're going!' said Ollie. Milo stopped and said, 'I'm so sorry, Ollie. Let me help you pick these up.' Together, they gathered all the scrolls. Ollie smiled and said, 'Thank you for stopping to help and for saying sorry. That shows respect!'
steps.question: What did Milo do that showed GOOD MANNERS?
options: He kept running to the market
He said sorry and helped pick up the scrolls
He blamed Ollie for being in the way
He ignored Ollie and went home

feedback.correct: Yes! Saying sorry when you make a mistake and helping to fix it shows respect and good manners! 🐕
feedback.incorrect: Think about what Milo did after the accident. Did he help or did he run away?

steps.narrationText: Later, Mira was carrying a heavy basket of books to the Story Tree. Duke saw her struggling.
steps.question: What should Duke do to show RIGHT CONDUCT?
options: Watch Mira struggle but do nothing
Offer to help Mira carry the heavy basket
Take the books and keep them

feedback.correct: Great choice! Helping others when they need it is an important part of right conduct. Magaling! 🌟
feedback.incorrect: When someone needs help, right conduct means offering to help. What would a good friend do?

steps.narrationText: Niko found a pouch of paw coins on the ground near the Discovery Lab. He knew it belonged to Poppy the rabbit because her name was on it.
steps.question: What is the HONEST thing for Niko to do?
options: Hide the pouch so no one finds it
Return the pouch to Poppy because it belongs to her
Spend the coins at the market

feedback.correct: Exactly! Being honest means returning things that don't belong to you. Katapatan is an important Filipino value! 🏆
feedback.incorrect: If something belongs to someone else, the honest thing is to give it back. What would you want someone to do if they found YOUR things?

steps.narrationText: At the end of the day, Duke gathered all the cats. 'Tell me, what did you learn today about being a good member of our community?'
steps.question: Which of these shows GOOD MANNERS AND RIGHT CONDUCT?
options: Saying sorry when you hurt someone's feelings
Helping a friend who needs it
Returning things that belong to others
All of the above — they all show GMRC!

feedback.correct: Perfect! Respect, helping others, and honesty are ALL part of Good Manners and Right Conduct. These values make our community stronger! 🐾❤️
feedback.incorrect: All of these are examples of good manners! Saying sorry, helping others, and being honest are all important.
